QA-07 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa07 html lang attribute set
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa07_html_lang_attribute_set 🕐 2026-05-30 02:37:28 ⏱ 15.01s
📋 What this test was checking
HTML element must have a lang attribute set to a valid language code — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
HTML element must have a lang attribute set to a valid language code.
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording

QA-07 -002 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa07 language buttons aria labels correct
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa07_language_buttons_aria_labels_correct 🕐 2026-05-30 02:37:28 ⏱ 1.65s
📋 What this test was checking
EN/AR language toggle buttons must have correct aria-labels — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
EN/AR language toggle buttons must have correct aria-labels.
✗ What actually happened
English button missing aria-label='English'
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
